Name: des3.u0.K_sub
Description: The 48-bit subkey input (K_sub) is used in each DES round. It is XORed with the expanded right-half (E) to form the intermediate value X, which directly drives the S-box lookups. The output of the S-boxes ultimately determines the permutation output P.

Name: des3.key1
Description: Top-level key input used by key_sel3 to derive 48-bit round subkeys (K_sub) that drive the Feistel function in crp across rounds.

Name: des3.key2
Description: Top-level key input used by key_sel3 in the subkey selection process for triple-DES operation.

Name: des3.key3
Description: Top-level key input used by key_sel3 to produce per-round K_sub values for the Feistel function.

Name: des3.K_sub
Description: Internal 48-bit subkey selected by key_sel3 based on roundSel and decrypt, XORed with the expanded data inside crp for each round.

Name: des3.desIn
Description: 64-bit input block that undergoes initial permutation and 16 Feistel rounds to produce desOut.

Name: des3.desIn
Description: When decrypt=0, desIn carries plaintext that is permuted and processed through 16 rounds to produce ciphertext.

Name: des3.decrypt
Description: 1-bit control that selects whether key scheduling and data flow operate in decryption or encryption direction.

Name: des3.roundSel
Description: 6-bit selector that determines which round’s subkey is used and steers internal muxing of Lout/Xin (with special handling at roundSel=0,16,32).

Name: des3.desOut
Description: Final 64-bit block produced after the final permutation of FP; represents the processed ciphertext (encryption) or plaintext (decryption).

Name: des3.u1.key1
Description: Provides one of the three 56-bit master keys that the module selects from to derive round subkeys.

Name: des3.u1.key2
Description: Provides the second 56-bit master key used in triple-DES key scheduling depending on the round bank and mode.

Name: des3.u1.key3
Description: Provides the third 56-bit master key used when the round bank and mode select this key for subkey derivation.

Name: des3.u1.roundSel
Description: Selects which set of subkeys is output for the current round and also influences which master key bank is chosen.

Name: des3.u1.decrypt
Description: Controls whether the subkey sequence is traversed in encryption or decryption order and which key bank ordering is applied.

Name: des3.u1.K_sub
Description: Outputs the 48-bit round subkey derived from the selected master key and round index for use by the DES round function.
